subcodes.first_line: Hearken, hearken! The Most Exalted Pen from the loftiest station of the world doth raise its call. Behold, behold! The Sun of proof shineth forth from the heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشنو بشنو قلم اعلی از اعلی مقام عالم ندا میفرماید ببین ببین نیر برهان از اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
